allow: PowerShell($ports = @\(3000, 8000\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { $pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($pid_ in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $pid_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $pid_ \(port $p\)" } catch {} } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600; foreach \($p in $ports\) { if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "port $p still held" } else { "port $p FREE" } })
